text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Now you're one step higher on the stairway to
adulthood! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm one year older now... but I still have so much
to learn if I want to become as skilled and mature
as you, Maruzen.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, when did you get so good with your words,
Chiyo?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: S-sorry! Was I laying it on a little thick?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Not at all, keep it coming! But just so you know,
you won't surpass me that easily. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
After all, I plan on being your kind and stylish
role model for as long as possible!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Y-you mean it, Maruzen? Wow... You really are
amazing!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But um, one day I'll also be a... fly, rad, and
totally tuba Umamusume—

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: It's tubular. ♪ Looks like you've got a ways to go if you want to be as hip and cool as I am.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Mgh, I'll try my best... I mean, right on, my dude!
